MINI MINUTES: MOVING: Dee A. Ware, Esq. (SENN PALUMBO 433-1500) for cross-defendant MARIA McVARISH
demurring to the First Amended Cross-Complaint
OPPOSING: Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq. (863-7565) for cross-complainant MULDOON ELDER
Argued and the Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that the demurrer was sustained with leave to amend as to Cause of Action 6 so that counsel can clarify what the source of duty is and to clarify the nature of injury. Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780.

WRITTEN TENTATIVE RULING:
Re Max Limited: Sustained re Cause of Action 3 with leave to amend to clarify motion and special injury. Re Cause of Action 6 - sustained with leave to amend. Otherwise overruled.
Re McVARISH - re Cause of Action 6, sustained without leave to amend. Otherwise overruled.
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing required. (cl)
